choices.text: ConnectionProvider + WalletProvider + WalletModalProvider + WalletMultiButton from @solana/wallet-adapter-react. Supports Phantom, Solflare, Backpack, Ledger, etc. useWallet() hook for state.
Helius DAS API getAssetsByOwner — supports compressed + regular NFTs in single call. Returns enriched metadata. Standard RPC getTokenAccountsByOwner only finds regular NFTs and is slow.

questions.explanation: Helius DAS API for unified NFT enumeration.
